title: Fit test - Starting Fit Test with one Earbud disconnected [TO BE UPDATED]
scenario: Starting Fit Test with one earbud disconnected shows results for connected earbud and marks disconnected earbud with yellow icon and "Fail" tag
steps: Start the app with Osprey/Tern/Emu connected, one earbud disconnected.
Navigate to Fit test (Tutorials, Onboarding, User Guides).
Try to start the Fit test.
expected: It is possible to start the Fit test. Results for the connected earbud are properly displayed. The disconnected earbud is marked with a yellow icon and "Fail" tag, with text "The {right/left} earbud was disconnected during the fit test".
